# Gcore Managed DNS

Authoritative DNS zones with AnycastDNS, DNSSEC, and healthchecks for failover; managed records A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, TXT, SRV, CAA, PTR, SOA, SPF, and HTTPS; zone import and export in BIND format, CNAME flattening at zone apex; dynamic responses with GeoDistance, Weighted shuffle, ASN, Country, Continent, Region, and IP pickers; CDN integration; Terraform provider, OctoDNS secondary DNS, Let's Encrypt issuance via Certbot.

- [Managed DNS](https://gcore.com/docs/dns.md)
- [GCore DNS overview](https://gcore.com/docs/dns/about-gcore-dns.md): Configure authoritative DNS zones with Managed DNS using AnycastDNS, geo-balancing, DNSSEC, health checks, and third-party integrations via Portal or API.
- [GCore managed DNS glossary](https://gcore.com/docs/dns/gcore-dns-glossary.md): Define DNS terminology including A/AAAA/CNAME records, DNS zones, DNSSEC, DNS propagation, authoritative nameservers, and DNS queries used in Gcore Managed DNS.
- [Getting started with managed DNS](https://gcore.com/docs/dns/manage-a-dns-zone.md): Create DNS zones in Gcore Customer Portal or API, configure NS records, and manage DNS records with TTL settings via the managed DNS infrastructure.

## Records
- [Supported DNS record types](https://gcore.com/docs/dns/dns-records.md): Reference eleven supported DNS record types in Gcore Managed DNS: A, AAAA, NS, CNAME, MX, TXT, SRV, CAA, PTR, SOA, and SPF with TTL and class parameters.
- [Manage DNS records](https://gcore.com/docs/dns/dns-records/manage-dns-records-non-advanced-interface-mode.md): Create and manage DNS records (A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, TXT, CAA, NS, SRV, HTTPS) in Gcore Customer Portal with TTL configuration and wildcard support.
- [Import and export records](https://gcore.com/docs/dns/dns-records/import-and-export-records.md): Export DNS records to BIND zone files (.zone) or import records from zone files to migrate domains and manage DNS record sets.
- [Create records in zone apex (CNAME flattening)](https://gcore.com/docs/dns/dns-records/specify-cname-at-root.md): Configure CNAME flattening in Gcore Managed DNS to create CNAME records at zone apex by removing A records and resolving CNAME chains to IP addresses.
- [Configure DNS records to send emails](https://gcore.com/docs/dns/dns-records/set-up-dns-for-sending-email.md): Configure A, MX, PTR, and SPF DNS records in Gcore Managed DNS to enable mail server authentication and prevent email spoofing and spam.
- [Setting up a PTR record and reverse DNS zone](https://gcore.com/docs/dns/dns-records/set-up-a-ptr-record-and-reverse-dns-zone.md): Configure PTR records and reverse DNS zones (in-addr.arpa, ip6.arpa) for IPv4/IPv6 addresses using Gcore Managed DNS with RIR delegation.
- [What is an HTTPS record and how is it configured?](https://gcore.com/docs/dns/dns-records/what-is-an-https-record-and-how-is-it-configured.md): Configure HTTPS DNS records in Gcore Managed DNS to reduce TLS handshake round trips and communicate protocol versions, ports, and alternate servers via sing...

## Advanced managing
- [Dynamic response](https://gcore.com/docs/dns/dns-records/configure-weight-balancing-and-geobalancing.md): Configure DNS dynamic response using pickers (GeoDistance, Weighted shuffle, ASN, Country, Continent, Region, IP) to deliver different records based on query...
- [What Healthcheck are and how to configure them](https://gcore.com/docs/dns/dns-failover/configure-and-use-dns-failover.md): Configure DNS Healthchecks to monitor server availability, exclude failed IPs from DNS responses, and redirect traffic to working servers using round-robin o...
- [Configure CDN integration](https://gcore.com/docs/dns/dns-records/advanced-managing/cdn-integration.md): Configure A/AAAA DNS records to resolve directly to Gcore CDN addresses, eliminating CNAME configuration and enabling automatic routing to optimal CDN endpoi...
- [Getting started with DNSSEC](https://gcore.com/docs/dns/getting-started-with-dnssec.md): Enable DNSSEC for DNS zones using API or Control Panel, configure DS records with registrars, and validate digital signatures across the DNS chain of trust.

## Integrations
- [Use GCore managed DNS as a secondary DNS with OctoDNS](https://gcore.com/docs/dns/dns-plugins/use-gcore-dns-as-a-secondary-dns-with-octodns.md): Configure Gcore managed DNS as secondary DNS using OctoDNS to synchronize zone records from primary DNS providers via Python virtualenv and YAML configuration.
- [Get a Let's Encrypt certificate with Certbot](https://gcore.com/docs/dns/dns-plugins/get-a-let-s-encrypt-certificate-with-certbot.md): Automate Let's Encrypt certificate issuance using Certbot plugin with Gcore DNS API and DNS-01 challenge validation.
